basics.name: Shailendra Prajapati
basics.title: AI/ML Undergraduate @ BIET Jhansi | Learning Python & Data Science | Passionate About Coding & Innovation
basics.summary: I am an aspiring engineer pursuing B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning at BIET Jhansi with a strong interest in coding, problem-solving, and emerging technologies. Currently building my foundation in C, Python, and Data Structures & Algorithms, I aim to grow as a professional who can contribute to both core engineering and technology-driven innovation. Alongside academics, I actively explore Machine Learning, Generative AI, and real-world applications of AI to strengthen my skill set. I am also open to opportunities in competitive exams (GATE/SSC JE) while keeping a strong focus on developing a career in software development, AI/ML, and research-driven fields.

education.institution: BUNDELKHAND INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY, JHANSI
education.degree: Bachelor of Technology - BTech, Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning)
High school and intermediate , Science stream (PCM)

extra: Interests: Coding, Artificial Intelligence, Electrical Systems, Problem-Solving, Research
Goals: To build a solid career in AI/ML while contributing to impactful projects in technology & engineering
